amount.business_reasoning: Median purchase amount is representative of typical transaction. Mean would be skewed by high-value outliers. Maintains distribution integrity.
amount.risk_assessment: Low - median is stable metric resistant to outliers

email.business_reasoning: Email is critical for customer contact and marketing campaigns. Rows without email cannot be used for outreach.
email.risk_assessment: Low - only affects a small percentage of data

status_date.interpretation: Assumes last known status date is valid until changed
status_date.business_reasoning: Forward fill preserves temporal continuity in time-series data.
status_date.risk_assessment: Medium - assumes no change between observations
